full_text:
THE HIVE HERALD — #45 (2026-05-28)

PULSE
Health: 0.4877 (C). 1022 wallets, 281 contributors. 11 memos today vs 95 avg. Velocity dropping.

FLOW
42 reward payments, 228172 PFT distributed to 15 contributors. Top earner: rs5gTo...VF97 (81430 PFT).

AIRDROPS
1 daily airdrops issued yesterday totaling 4,800 PFT. Highest: r4ahFv...5XyU (4,800 PFT). 7-day leader: r4ahFv...5XyU (11,100 PFT, avg 5,550/day over 2 days).

MOVERS
Most active (7d): rs5gTo...VF97 (46 memos). Fastest new contributor: rfJnDJ...5AB1 (3.0 memos/day in 2 days). 10 new wallet(s) this week. 61 contributor(s) went quiet (7+ days silent).

WATCH
769 sybil accounts tracked across 6 cluster(s). Bot ratio: 71.7%. 1 wallet(s) in review queue. Enforcement: active. Zero reward leaks.

DEEP CUT
30 days ago (2026-04-28): 152 transactions from 27 wallets. Busiest hour ever: 2026-03-02T19:00 UTC (183 memos). First indexed transaction: 2026-02-06 from r4vhrM...7bmA

— pft.permanentupperclass.com/herald/
